imageAlt: GoCardless - Instant bank pay roadmap item preview image
title: GoCardless - Instant bank pay
summaryBody:
- Take instant payments (as well as direct debits) using GoCardless
- Uses open banking functionality which avoids card transaction fees
- Payee verifies payment via their banking app or online banking, rather than needing to enter card details
